title: Beyth #1020
definition:
Beth-jesimoth = "house of the desolation"

 1) a place in Moab given to the tribe of Reuben
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-jesimoth = "house of the desolation"

 1) a place in Moab given to the tribe of Reuben

    NASB:  place of the desert, a place E. of the Jordan in Moab
